archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Dark Mode Variant for Developer Tools

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use 1px subtle borders to expose the skeleton, flat backgrounds, no soft shadows.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Paragraphs and dense content must be left-aligned. Align code blocks relative to container.

components.hero: Left-aligned strong heading. Badge with 'Status: Active' in technical mono font.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no shadow. Hover: slight border color darken/lighten. Must have generous internal padding (p-8).
components.code_blocks: Black background, subtle border, distinct syntax highlighting colors (e.g., green for strings, blue for keywords). MUST include a 'Copy to Clipboard' button in the top right corner with hover state.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs component for switching between 'curl' and 'fetch' examples. Customize height and active state indicator (e.g., sharp bottom border).

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All buttons and interactive cards MUST have explicit hover text/bg color changes.
interactions_and_motion.copy_action: Icon change from Clipboard to Check on success, plus toast notification.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use text-neutral-400 for secondary, text-white for primary.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='copy-curl-button').

icons.usage: Use precise technical icons (e.g., Terminal, Shield, Link, Copy, Check).

hero_bg.description: Dark mode abstract background for developer tool, deep black and indigo gradient. Use as a very subtle, low-opacity (opacity-20) absolute background element in the hero section to break up the solid black, with a mask-image to fade out.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React app (App.jsx) with Tailwind CSS.
Implement a dark theme using the specified color palette (bg-[#0A0A0A] base).
Set up Google Fonts for Chivo (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), and JetBrains Mono (code).
The page must contain 4 main sections: 1. Hero / Intro, 2. Authentication (Bearer Token), 3. URL Format, 4. Code Examples (Tabs for curl/fetch).
Implement Shadcn Tabs for the Code Examples section.
Implement Sonner for copy-to-clipboard toast notifications.
All code blocks must be easily readable with syntax-like colors and a copy button.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, tabs, and input/copy areas.
Apply the hero_bg image as a subtle background behind the hero section with low opacity.
Ensure cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) details are mentioned in the text (the proxy forwards Authorization headers).
